# Ahimo

> Ahimo is a privacy-first iOS health app that pairs Apple Watch and HealthKit biometrics with user-logged context (mood, stress, energy, drinks, symptoms, menstrual cycle) and uses on-device AI — Apple Foundation Models or local MLX models — to surface personal correlations between habits and outcomes. It includes AIHA, an on-device chat assistant grounded in the user's own data. Tagline: "Your health data. Finally decoded." Website: https://ahimo.app

> Built by Radim Šimánek (https://github.com/Rad1m, https://www.linkedin.com/in/radim-simanek/). Background: agentic AI engineering at Roche under a strict no-hallucination, source-traceable RAG constraint; MIT Professional Education's Applied Agentic AI for Organizational Transformation (2026); ETH Zürich CAS Cyber Security; 20 years across pharma, automotive, nuclear, and energy. Personal blog: https://brainintheloop.com

## About

- [README](README.md): Overview, audience, headline features, screenshots, and links
- [ABOUT](ABOUT.md): Long-form description of what Ahimo is, the problem it solves, the three-layer insights pipeline, AIHA chat, and the on-device privacy philosophy
- [FEATURES](FEATURES.md): Complete feature inventory — logging, HealthKit integration, CSQI, Layer 1/2/3 insights pipeline with the 30 correlation analyzers, AIHA chat, dashboard, watch app, widgets, notifications, privacy and architecture
- [FAQ](FAQ.md): Frequently asked questions covering basics, how it works, AIHA, setup and devices, data and privacy, comparisons, and cross-app data exchange with Falcata

## Key facts

- App name: Ahimo
- Platforms: iPhone (primary), Apple Watch (companion), home-screen widgets, optional iCloud backup
- Audience: Apple Watch owners, self-trackers, people tracking menstrual cycles, privacy-first health users
- Logged metrics: mood, energy, stress, drinks (alcoholic + caffeinated), symptoms, intimacy, menstrual events, free-text tags
- HealthKit metrics: sleep (with stages), heart rate, HRV, steps, workouts, blood pressure, menstrual data
- Composite Sleep Quality Index (CSQI): single 0–100 score weighted from duration, schedule consistency, and stage composition
- Insights pipeline: 3 layers — L1 statistical baselines (in-memory), L2 correlation analyzers (CoreData, 48h TTL, 30 analyzers), L3 on-device LLM (weekly, indefinite TTL)
- Layer 2 analyzer count: 30, covering sleep impact, heart rate, activity, menstrual cycle (7), behavioral, lifestyle (drinks↔sleep), recovery, circadian, and absence impact
- AI assistant: AIHA — on-device chat with Pro Mode for larger context
- AI backends: Apple Intelligence (Foundation Models) or MLX (default model: SmolLM3-3B-4bit; also Qwen3.5-4B, Llama-3.2-1B)
- Architecture: MVVM + Services with a single UnifiedDataManager gateway; CoreData with NSPersistentCloudKitContainer
- Privacy: all health analysis and AI inference run on-device; the only off-device traffic is mandatory anonymous crash logs and optional opt-in analytics
- Languages: English, Deutsch, Español
- Compliance: GDPR + Swiss FADP
- Designed in: Switzerland
- Cross-app sharing: shares an on-device MLX model cache and an optional user-logged-metrics snapshot with sister app Falcata via a local app group (no cloud)
- Website: https://ahimo.app
